name: P2000 | 黑曜石
descriptionEn: Accurate and controllable, the German-made P2000 is a serviceable first-round pistol that works best against unarmored opponents. It has been custom painted to look like it was submerged in lava and is solidifying into obsidian as it cools. Giving the term \"glass cannon\" a whole new meaning
descriptionZh: 精准、可控，这把德国制造的耐用第一回合手枪非常适合对付那些没有穿护甲的对手。 这把武器使用了自定义涂装。淬入熔岩，凝为龙晶。 重新定义“玻璃大炮”
